context: Evaluating a Coralogix support response for: I'm trying to copy the k8s namespace name from the resource down into each log record as an attribute so I can filter on

checklist.name: explains-that-under-context-log-the-bare-attr
checklist.description: Explains that under context: log the bare attributes[...] refers to the log-record attributes, not the resource attributes, and that the fix is to use resource.attributes[...] — i.e. diagnoses the wrong-context cause, not just prescribes a path rewrite.
